# Psalms 103

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-INDEX (verse table + nav; auto-generated — safe to regenerate) -->

↑ [Psalms](../README.md)  ·  [‹ Psalms 102](../Psalms-102/README.md)  ·  [Psalms 104 ›](../Psalms-104/README.md)

📖 **Full text:** [BBE](BBE.md) · [WEB](WEB.md) · [KJV](KJV.md) · [ASV](ASV.md)

## Verses (22)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Give praise to the Lord, O my soul; let everything in me give praise to his holy name. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Give praise to the Lord, O my soul; let not all his blessings go from your memory. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | He has forgiveness for all your sins; he takes away all your diseases; | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | He keeps back your life from destruction, crowning you with mercy and grace. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | He makes your mouth full of good things, so that your strength is made new again like the eagle's. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | The Lord gives decisions in righteousness for all who are in trouble. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | He gave knowledge of his way to Moses, and made his acts clear to the children of Israel. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | The Lord is kind and full of pity, not quickly made angry, but ever ready to have mercy. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | His feeling will no longer be bitter; he will not keep his wrath for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | He has not given us the punishment for our sins, or the reward of our wrongdoing. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | For as the heaven is high over the earth, so great is his mercy to his worshippers. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | As far as the east is from the west, so far has he put our sins from us. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | As a father has pity on his children, so the Lord has pity on his worshippers. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | For he has knowledge of our feeble frame; he sees that we are only dust. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | As for man, his days are as grass: his beautiful growth is like the flower of the field. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | The wind goes over it and it is gone; and its place sees it no longer. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | But the mercy of the Lord is eternal for his worshippers, and their children's children will see his righteousness; | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | If they keep his agreement, and have his laws in mind to do them. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | The Lord has made ready his high seat in the heavens; his kingdom is ruling over all. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | Give praise to the Lord, you his angels, who are great in strength, doing his orders, and waiting for his voice. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | Give praise to the Lord, all you his armies; and you his servants who do his pleasure. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | Give praise to the Lord, all his works, in all places under his rule: give praise to the Lord, O my soul. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
